title: Saint Kitts & Nevis Passport
metaDescription: Explore the benefits of obtaining a Saint Kitts & Nevis passport. and the advantages of St. Kitts & Nevis citizenship, including visa-free travel, and investment opportunities.

sections.heading: Saint Kitts & Nevis Passport
paragraphs: To obtain St. Kitts and Nevis passport through the citizenship by investment program

sections.heading: Saint Kitts & Nevis Passport
paragraphs: The Saint Kitts & Nevis passport is official travel document issued to all Kittitian and Nevisian citizens and serves as proof of identity during international travel. The passport obtained through the Saint Kitts & Nevis Citizenship by Investment program is the same passport held by native Kittitian and Nevisian citizens. The Saint Kitts & Nevis passport is a biometric passport containing 32 watermarked pages of national images that proudly reflect the heritage of the islands.

sections.heading: Validity of the Saint Kitts & Nevis Passport
list: The Saint Kitts & Nevis passport is valid for 10 years.
Passports issued to children under 16 years of age are valid for 5 years.

sections.heading: Saint Kitts & Nevis Passport Power
paragraphs: The Saint Kitts & Nevis passport has an advanced rank amongst the world’s passports, as it allows its holders to travel visa-free to more than 150 international destinations. This attractive feature drives many investors to apply for the St. Kitts and Nevis Citizenship by Investment (CBI) program.

sections.heading: How to Apply for a Saint Kitts & Nevis Passport
paragraphs: The applicant needs to meet the Saint Kitts & Nevis passport requirements and prove Saint Kitts & Nevis citizenship, whether obtained by birth, descent, adoption or through Saint Kitts & Nevis Citizenship by Investment program. The required documentation for applying includes: Completed passport application form
list: Proof of payment of Saint Kitts & Nevis passport fees
Two personal photos The photos should be a recent taken within the last six months.
The photo size should be 45x35 mm in size.

The full face must be visible (no sunglasses or hats, and in the case of veiled women, head coverings must be black in color and not obstruct the hairline), facial expressions must be neutral, ears must be visible, and no teeth should be showing.
The background must be solid and neutral in color.

The reverse side of one copy of the photographs must be endorsed by the Recommender with the words: “I certify that this is a true likeness of the applicant (stating the applicant’s full name)” and should bear the recommender’s signature and official stamp. (The Recommender should be a person of official standing or personally acquainted with the applicant, not including family members.)
Original birth certificate or original citizenship certificate (in case of obtaining Saint Kitts & Nevis citizenship by investment).
Stamps fees
Old passport in the case of passport renewal.
Police record
Marriage/divorce certificate, if applicable
Passport recovery form, in the event of a previous lost or stolen Saint Kitts & Nevis passport

sections.heading: Saint Kitts & Nevis Passport Benefits
list: The Saint Kitts & Nevis passport power makes it possible for its holder to travel to over 150 countries without a visa or with a visa-upon-arrival.
The Saint Kitts & Nevis biometric passport is a sophisticated and secure passport that guarantees an advanced level of protection against data theft or impersonation.

Saint Kitts & Nevis passport holders through the citizenship by investment can maintain dual citizenship and retain their original citizenship and passport, while enjoying the additional Saint Kitts & Nevis passport benefits.

The Saint Kitts & Nevis passport is a profitable investment that can be obtained through the Saint Kitts & Nevis citizenship by investment program, thus benefitting its holders with great investment opportunities and tax exemptions.
The Saint Kitts & Nevis passport has a long validity period of up to 10 years.

sections.heading: Saint Kitts & Nevis Citizenship by Investment and Passport
paragraphs: Business people and investors who succeed in obtaining Saint Kitts & Nevis citizenship through investment benefit from tax freedoms on wealth, gifts, inheritances, foreign income and capital gains that Saint Kitts & Nevis affords to all residents and nonresidents of the island. The Saint Kitts & Nevis Citizenship by Investment program offers the Saint Kitts & Nevis citizenship and passport to investors or business persons who meet the minimum investment requirements.
list: Saint Kitts & Nevis citizenship by investment can be obtained through one of three options: Making a non-refundable contribution to the Saint Kitts & Nevis Sustainable Growth Fund.
Investing in a government-approved real estate project in Saint Kitts and Nevis.
Investing in potential Alternative Investment (AIO) projects listed by the government or proposed by private individuals with adequate financial capabilities.

After obtaining Saint Kitts & Nevis citizenship through the Saint Kitts & Nevis Citizenship by Investment program, you can apply for a Saint Kitts & Nevis passport and enjoy all the advantages offered to its holders, most notably Saint Kitts & Nevis passport visa-free travel to more than 150 countries worldwide.

The Saint Kitts & Nevis Economic Citizenship Program does not require residency on the islands in order to obtain or renew a passport, suitable for business people who want to enjoy the benefits of holding a high ranking second passport without the obligation of residency in Saint Kitts & Nevis.

sections.heading: St. Kitts and Nevis Visa Free Countries
paragraphs: Over the past number of years, the government of Saint Kitts and Nevis has been successfully working on expanding its list of Visa-free countries

faqs.q: How strong is St. Kitts and Nevis passport?
faqs.a: St. Kitts and Nevis passport ranks 26th place according to the Guide Passport Ranking Index, It provides visa-free access to 155 countries.
